default.speaker: Tommy
default.text: Hi! I'm Tommy! Are you the new counselor?

default.speaker: Pink Panther
default.text: That's right. Nice to meet you, Tommy.

default.speaker: Tommy
default.text: I love telling stories! Did you know there's a legend about a treasure at this camp?

default.speaker: Tommy
default.text: Probably not true though... I like making things sound more exciting than they are!

default.speaker: Pink Panther
default.text: A natural storyteller. I like that.

post.speaker: Tommy
post.text: Want to hear another story? I've got HUNDREDS!

strange.speaker: Tommy
strange.text: Do you hear that? The music?

strange.speaker: Tommy
strange.text: It's drums and singing... and there's a GIANT STATUE watching over everyone!

strange.speaker: Tommy
strange.text: People are dancing in the streets! It's like the biggest party in the world!

strange.speaker: Tommy
strange.text: And then... tango? Somewhere else, a different city, a wide road with a tall white tower...

strange.speaker: Pink Panther
strange.text: Tommy, are you alright? You've never been to any of these places.

strange.speaker: Tommy
strange.text: I KNOW! That's what's so weird! But I can SEE it!

postStrange.speaker: Tommy
postStrange.text: The music won't stop... a giant statue, parades, dancing...

postStrange.speaker: Tommy
postStrange.text: It feels like two places at once. I can't explain it.
